text.title: AI Overview Content Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the retrofit output: per-section schema, retrofit-log shape, eligibility checklist.

section.title: Required section schema

list.item: section.kind: enum {definition, quick_answer, comparison_table, numbered_steps, citation_row, prose}
section.position: integer (DOM order)
section.required_for_aio: bool (definition + quick_answer + citation_row are required; comparison_table required only for comparison queries)
section.word_count: integer (definition: 12-30; quick_answer: 30-50; numbered_steps: variable)
section.citations: array of primary-source URLs (required for citation_row, comparison_table)

section.reference: Authoritative JSON Schema for the section objects.

section.title: Retrofit log shape

list.item: retrofitter (named human or agent identity)
sections_added: array of section.kind values added in this pass
citations_added: array of citations newly attached
aio_baseline_status: from sibling `ai-overview-presence-tracker` at retrofit time
aio_status_after_30d: populated 30 days post-retrofit (sibling tracker callback)

section.reference: Markdown template for the log entry.

list.item: Definition section present within first 200 words.
Quick answer section, 30-50 words, self-contained.
Numbered lists (when present) use bolded prefix per item.
Each H2 ends with a citation row OR an inline citation.
Comparison-shaped queries have a real `` markup table with >= 4 dims, >= 3 candidates.
No forbidden generic openers in the first 120 words (see `ai-content-quality-review` r4).

antipattern.description: Section.kind == comparison_table but content uses `|` characters instead of `` markup.
antipattern.reason: r2 violation. Text-table is not extracted.

antipattern.description: numbered_steps section without bolded prefix per item.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation. AIO parser falls back to first sentence.

antipattern.description: citation_row missing or contains only same-domain self-links.
antipattern.reason: r4 violation. Primary external sources are required.
r5 violation. AIO snippet floor not met.

list.item: Every required section kind is present.
Word counts per section within the rule range.
Citations are primary sources, not aggregators.
retrofit_log entry created and committed alongside the piece.
30-day callback scheduled in the sibling tracker.
